---
title: 'SVSoC: Speculative Vision Systems-on-a-Chip'
author:
- Yiming Gan
- Yuxian Qiu
- Jingwen Leng
- Yuhao Zhu
categories:
- Show All
- Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
topics:
- visual_computing_systems
url_source: https://horizon-lab.org/pubs/cal19.pdf
journ: CAL
year: 2019
contrib: Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
image: featured.png
pub_number: 26
---
